7:["$","$L6","Asset Record1",{"heading":"Asset Record","body":"Our asset management ERP software is designed to streamline and optimize your fixed asset management processes. It centralizes all transactions related to assets, including purchasing, sales, depreciation, scrapping, movement, and maintenance. The software automatically generates depreciation schedules based on selected methods and inputs, ensuring accurate financial reporting. You can efficiently manage records for various company assets, such as computers, furniture, and vehicles. The system tracks asset locations, monitors employee assignments, and maintains detailed records of maintenance activities. This comprehensive approach helps businesses maintain control over their assets, enhance operational efficiency, and ensure accurate financial management.","image":"$undefined","imageAlt":"Asset Record","reversed":true}]
8:["$","$L6","Depreciations and Balances2",{"heading":"Depreciations and Balances","body":"Our asset management ERP software efficiently automates the creation of depreciation schedules using various methods such as Straight Line, Double Declining Balance, and Written Down Value. The system generates these schedules based on inputs like Depreciation Method, Total Number of Depreciations, and Available to Use Date. You can also create multiple depreciation schedules for different Finance Books, allowing for comprehensive financial reporting. Additionally, the software supports manual entries, giving you the flexibility to make adjustments as needed. This robust functionality ensures accurate and streamlined asset depreciation management, enhancing your overall financial control and efficiency.","image":"https://9t9it.com/images/asset-management/asset-management-erp-software-depreciation-708.webp","imageAlt":"Depreciations and Balances","reversed":false}]
9:["$","$L6","Maintenance3",{"heading":"Maintenance","body":"or Calibration, along with periodicity, assignment, and start and end dates. The software automatically calculates the next due date based on the start date and periodicity, generating a scheduled task to ensure timely maintenance. This integrated approach ensures effective asset management, reduces downtime, and optimizes resource use.","image":"$undefined","imageAlt":"Maintenance","reversed":true}]
a:["$","$L6","Asset Management ERP Software4",{"heading":"Asset Management ERP Software","body":". Attach pictures, owner's manuals, and essential documents to each asset record for comprehensive management. Print unique barcodes to easily assign assets to employees or business locations, and streamline asset lifecycle management, including maintenance, automatic depreciation, and disposal through sale or scrapping. Perform asset reconciliation as needed or on a set schedule to ensure accuracy. Our software also helps you comply with audit requirements by maintaining detailed and accessible records, making asset management and reporting straightforward and efficient.","image":"https://9t9it.com/images/asset-management/asset-management-erp-software-708.webp","imageAlt":"Asset Management ERP Software","reversed":false}]
